description: Attached-flow nominal 6DOF rollout using pilot commands and no fitted stall correction.
notes: No-fit baseline; mismatch includes actuator lag, hidden stall/nonlinear aerodynamics, and mocap-derived initialization error.

description: Global affine discrete state-space fit x[k+1]=A x[k]+B u_cmd[k]+c.
notes: Open-loop rollout; validation measurements are not assimilated after initialization.

description: Nominal RK4 model plus ridge-fitted one-step residual correction.
notes: Residual corrects actuator lag and hidden nonlinear stall/aerodynamic effects around the attached-flow model.

description: Airdata-scheduled family of local affine one-step state models.
notes: Local models are selected by speed, angle of attack, and sideslip during open-loop validation.

description: Frequency-domain-inspired global linear baseline approximated by a regularized one-step realization.
notes: Placeholder 6DOF frequency row: uses an identified realization rather than CIFER/SIDPAC tooling.

description: Airdata-scheduled local realization residuals around the nominal 6DOF equations.
notes: 6DOF counterpart to local frequency/model stitching; trained from the selected 6DOF dataset. Not a frequency-domain method: local affine residual fits scheduled on airdata.

description: Affine derivative regression rolled out open-loop with explicit integration.
notes: Equation-error least squares on Savitzky-Golay smoothed derivatives (50 ms quadratic window).

description: Smoothed weak-form derivative fit used as a lightweight variational baseline.
notes: Approximates the variational idea by smoothing trajectories before derivative regression.

description: Sparse quadratic-library derivative model fitted by iterated threshold-and-refit (STLSQ).
notes: Uses a generic polynomial library rather than aerodynamic-coefficient structure.

description: Sparse stepwise quadratic one-step predictor.
notes: Sparse-ridge analogue: magnitude pruning, not statistical forward selection (no PSE/PRESS).

description: Quadratic lifted one-step predictor rolled out in the original state coordinates.
notes: EDMD analogue: quadratic one-step ridge predicting raw states; lifted observables are not propagated.

description: Attached-flow nominal dynamics plus quadratic learned residual map.
notes: Deterministic UDE analogue: ridge residual map, no neural network or ODE-in-the-loop training. Residual around the attached-flow nominal model.

description: Physics-structured residual closure constrained to the attached-flow 6DOF equations.
notes: Tractable PINN-style row: sparsified copy of the 6DOF-UDE-Residual ridge weights; no physics-informed training is run.

description: Lagged ARX/Hankel linear predictor using a three-sample state history.
notes: Lagged ARX analogue: no Hankel SVD or state realization (not N4SID/MOESP).

description: Sparse RBF/Gaussian-process-style residual surrogate around attached-flow dynamics.
notes: RBF residual closure trained on a deterministic subset to keep the 6DOF suite tractable.

description: Random-feature neural-surrogate analogue for residual dynamics.
notes: Closed-form random-feature surrogate used as a lightweight 6DOF neural baseline; no neural network is trained.

notes: 6DOF counterpart to local frequency/model stitching; trained from the selected 6DOF dataset. Not a frequency-domain method: local affine residual fits scheduled on airdata.

description: Filter-error estimation: augmented-state EKF over the grey-box parameters with CasADi Jacobians.
notes: Joseph-form augmented-state EKF runs over the manual training chunks only; validation is a frozen-theta open-loop rollout receiving pilot commands.

description: Affine derivative regression rolled out open-loop with explicit integration.
notes: Equation-error least squares on Savitzky-Golay smoothed derivatives (50 ms quadratic window).

description: Smoothed weak-form derivative fit used as a lightweight variational baseline.
notes: Approximates the variational idea by smoothing trajectories before derivative regression.

notes: Sparse-ridge analogue: magnitude pruning, not statistical forward selection (no PSE/PRESS).

description: Quadratic lifted one-step predictor rolled out in the original state coordinates.
notes: EDMD analogue: quadratic one-step ridge predicting raw states; lifted observables are not propagated.

description: Attached-flow nominal dynamics plus quadratic learned residual map.
notes: Deterministic UDE analogue: ridge residual map, no neural network or ODE-in-the-loop training. Residual around the fitted grey-box airframe (UDE premise: best known physics + learned residual).

description: Physics-structured residual closure constrained to the attached-flow 6DOF equations.
notes: Tractable PINN-style row: sparsified copy of the 6DOF-UDE-Residual ridge weights; no physics-informed training is run.

description: Lagged ARX/Hankel linear predictor using a three-sample state history.
notes: Lagged ARX analogue: no Hankel SVD or state realization (not N4SID/MOESP).

description: Sparse RBF/Gaussian-process-style residual surrogate around attached-flow dynamics.
notes: RBF residual closure trained on a deterministic subset to keep the 6DOF suite tractable.

description: Random-feature neural-surrogate analogue for residual dynamics.
notes: Closed-form random-feature surrogate used as a lightweight 6DOF neural baseline; no neural network is trained.

description: Physical lumped-parameter Sport Cub grey-box fitted by output-error multiple shooting over the training chunks.
notes: 22 aerodynamic coefficients fitted within physical bounds; the same parameters drive the browser free-runs.

description: Universal differential equation: fitted grey-box physics plus an MLP residual trained RK4-in-the-loop.
notes: Two-layer tanh MLP on invariant features corrects the six dynamic derivatives of the fitted grey-box; trained by simulation error over 0.5 s shooting segments (no derivative targets); frozen-network open-loop validation.

description: Cramer-Rao parameter uncertainty and coupling analysis of the grey-box output-error fit.
notes: Same rollout as 6DOF-GreyBoxOEM; this row carries the uncertainty analysis: weak parameters (>25% rel. std): KLp, KM0, KMa, KMq, KMe, KNp; strong couplings (|r|>0.9): KL0-KN0, KLdr-KNdr, KLp-KNp, KLb-KNb, KLr-KNr, KLda-KNda, KM0-KMa, KNr-KNda, CL0-CLa, KLr-KLda, KNb-KNr, KLb-KLr. Bounds are optimistic (residual coloring uncorrected).
